name: Edit Single Section
description: Quick edit of a single section: load section text, apply edits, run 7-skill pipeline, output revised section.

nodes.prompt: Ask the researcher to provide the section text and what edits they want: rewrite, expand, cut, fix citations, adjust style, or other changes.

Spawn section-writer agent for this section. Apply full 7-skill pipeline: draft with vectorless search, style fingerprint compliance, Hebrew grammar, academic language & linking words, language purity, repetition check, citation audit.
